message.content:
The screenshot shows a personal portfolio website for John Shannon Rodriguez, a full - stack web developer. The page has a dark background with dynamic, flowing golden - orange light streaks. At the top, there's a navigation bar with links like “WORK”, “ABOUT”, “CONTACT”, “GET IN TOUCH”, and a “GET IN TOUCH” button. The main content area features large, bold text with “John Shannon” in white and “Rodriguez” in an orange - hued, cursive font. Below this, there's a paragraph describing the developer's work. On the right, there's a profile image with labels like “FIG. 01 — THE DEVELOPER” and “PARANQUE IT — PH AVAILABLE”. At the bottom, there's a “SCROLL TO READ” prompt.

There is **no** minimalist intro overlay with the text “oh.... hey!” (or similar) centered on a plain background. The text, font style, and clean intro screen as described in the question are not present. The entire page is visible, and there is no overlay covering the rest of the page.
